positive: A highly stylized, whimsical jungle fox amidst bioluminescent flora. The fox is captured in a dynamic, playful pose, sitting atop giant, iridescent lily pads. The background is a dense, magical forest canopy rendered in deep teal, emerald, and violet tones. Focus on strong, graphic silhouettes of the foliage and the fox itself. The art style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau linework and modern sticker/t-shirt graphic design, ensuring bold lines, flat color fields, and high contrast. Lighting should be dramatic, with ethereal glowing highlights emanating from the flora (bioluminescence effect) contrasting against deep shadow areas. Central composition, perfect for apparel printing, vector-like clarity. Minimalist details, maximalist color story.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, signature, logo, lowres, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, writing, poor composition, photographic, photorealistic
